info.title: docx2html 1.0.0 - Convert Word documents to HTML

options.name: --title
options.description: Page title (default: document title or filename)

options.name: --inline-styles
options.description: Use inline styles instead of CSS classes

options.name: --extract-images
options.description: Save images to separate files instead of embedding

arguments.name: INPUTDOCX
arguments.description: Path to the input Word document

arguments.name: OUTPUTHTML
arguments.description: Path for the output HTML file (default: input with .html extension)
